languages.original_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

languages.text: "Даже в самых невыносимых условиях слуг Бога-Императора согревает вера в их сердцах! И желание поразить врага Его, где бы тот ни прятался".
"Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."
languages.original_text: "Даже в самых невыносимых условиях слуг Бога-Императора согревает вера в их сердцах! И желание поразить врага Его, где бы тот ни прятался".

traits.locale_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."
"Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."
"Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

languages.text: 「どんなに耐え難い状況下においても、神皇帝のしもべは心の信仰と敵を討つという思いで温められている！」
languages.original_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

traits.locale_text: 「どんなに耐え難い状況下においても、神皇帝のしもべは心の信仰と敵を討つという思いで温められている！」

languages.text: « Même dans les conditions les plus intolérables, la foi des serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu leur réchauffe le cœur ! Ainsi que leur désir d'anéantir Ses ennemis, où qu'ils puissent rôder. »
languages.original_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

traits.locale_text: « Même dans les conditions les plus intolérables, la foi des serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu leur réchauffe le cœur ! Ainsi que leur désir d'anéantir Ses ennemis, où qu'ils puissent rôder. »

languages.text: "Selbst unter den unerträglichsten Bedingungen werden die Diener des Gottimperators vom Glauben in ihren Herzen gewärmt! Und vom Wunsch, Seine Feinde zu zerschmettern, egal, wo sie lauern."
languages.original_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

traits.locale_text: "Selbst unter den unerträglichsten Bedingungen werden die Diener des Gottimperators vom Glauben in ihren Herzen gewärmt! Und vom Wunsch, Seine Feinde zu zerschmettern, egal, wo sie lauern."

languages.text: "En katlanılmaz koşullarda bile Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları, kalplerindeki inançla ısınır! O'nun düşmanlarını saklandıkları her yerde vurma arzusuyla da."
languages.original_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

traits.locale_text: "En katlanılmaz koşullarda bile Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları, kalplerindeki inançla ısınır! O'nun düşmanlarını saklandıkları her yerde vurma arzusuyla da."

languages.text: «¡Aun en las condiciones más intolerables, los siervos del Dios Emperador hallan consuelo en el fervor de su fe y el deseo de castigar a Sus enemigos doquiera que acechen!».
languages.original_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

traits.locale_text: «¡Aun en las condiciones más intolerables, los siervos del Dios Emperador hallan consuelo en el fervor de su fe y el deseo de castigar a Sus enemigos doquiera que acechen!».

languages.text: “即便在最难以忍受的条件下，神皇之仆们也能因心中的信仰而感到温暖！因渴望痛击潜藏的神皇之敌而炽热！”
languages.original_text: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."

traits.locale_text: “即便在最难以忍受的条件下，神皇之仆们也能因心中的信仰而感到温暖！因渴望痛击潜藏的神皇之敌而炽热！”
